description_long: This is a fixed-blade combat or utility knife featuring a long, straight, single-edged blade with a black finish and a prominent fuller running along its length. The blade is attached to a cylindrical handle made of stacked brown leather rings, providing both grip and a classic aesthetic. A flat, circular pommel caps the end of the handle, while a simple crossguard separates the blade from the handle, enhancing safety during use. The knife's design is robust and utilitarian, reminiscent of military-issue knives such as the KA-BAR. The materials and construction suggest it is intended for heavy-duty tasks, with a focus on durability and functionality. No decorative elements or ornamentation are visible, emphasizing its practical purpose.
description: A robust, straight-bladed combat or utility knife with a black blade, brown stacked leather handle, and a simple crossguard. The design is utilitarian and durable, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black blade, the brown stacked leather handle, and the crossguard.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, displaying the circular pommel and the narrow blade profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the full blade and handle, with the fuller and crossguard visible.
description_view_3: Blade tip-on view, highlighting the alignment of the blade with the handle and the circular pommel.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, stacked brown leather rings, flat pommel, ergonomic grip
